primary_goal: improve Codeberg-first conversion from existing repo traffic
why_this_action: Codeberg adoption is flat across the recent measurement window.
Same-day directory and curator outreach are already saturated.
Repo conversion surfaces are directly executable from this runtime and sit closest to turning interest into a star/watch/issue on Codeberg.
verification: link-existence check for all newly referenced docs
expected_outcome: clearer first-run path and stronger Codeberg-primary CTA for qualified evaluators already reaching the repo
replacement_condition: If Codeberg stars/watchers/forks remain flat after the next meaningful traffic window, treat this conversion-surface refresh as insufficient and switch back to a different demand-capture lane.
